name: Cal/OSHA Process Safety Management (8 CCR 5189)
what_it_does: Requires a Process Safety Management program when a process involves a listed highly hazardous chemical at or above its threshold quantity, or a process using a flammable liquid/gas above 10,000 lb.
jurisdiction: Cal/OSHA (DIR Division of Occupational Safety and Health)

hypotheses.question: Does a process at the facility involve a highly hazardous chemical at or above the PSM threshold quantity?
hypotheses.claim_to_test: A process with a listed highly hazardous chemical at/above its threshold quantity (or >10,000 lb flammable) triggers Cal/OSHA PSM.
